planningIntent.title: Planning Intent
planningIntent.p1: Following in the tradition of popular films like 'Taken' and 'Man from Nowhere,' The Spectra Heist will tell the action-packed, suspenseful story of a father who will travel across the Gen Sol Galaxy fighting sinister forces to save his kidnapped daughter. The series will focus on giving the audience high-stakes drama with emotional resonance and ending with a suspenseful cliffhanger. As motivations of the different characters intertwine and collide, the series will end with a shocking conclusion.
planningIntent.p2: One of the main attractions for this story is the detailed worldbuilding around this exciting sci-fi universe which can catch the interest of a global audience. Sci-fi is again becoming one of the most popular genres in content, and we believe with the current state of technology and interest, it is the perfect time to create a high quality 3D animated series set in an alien galaxy to tell an exciting, heartfelt story filled with fascinating characters in dramatic situations that will make the audience feel suspense and wonder.

summary.title: Summary of the Work
summary.p1: On the small planet Edona, Josen is a farmer who lives with his 9 year old daughter, Naro, and their faithful pet Lashi. They have a simple farm life, their prospects tied to hard work and the seasons, but their lives are also full of love for each other. The big sadness, however, that hangs over them is that Naro's mother passed away from an illness when Naro was just a young child. Ever since then Josen has been an overly worrying father, always concerned about Naro's health, fearful she would also get sick like her mother. Even though Naro understands why he acts this way, she doesn't want to worry her father and so has come to hide things from him.
summary.p2: Soon, however, their idyllic life turns upside down when sinister alien forces kidnap Naro in order to blackmail Josen into stealing a rare form of spectra energy that is worth unlimited power and wealth from the Dorakken Empire.
summary.p3: To accomplish this, Josen must enlist the help of Senae, a great warrior, and the most infamous criminal in the Gen Sol Galaxy, known as the Kid. Together they must do the impossible and figure out how to get into the galaxy's most heavily guarded vaults to steal Dorakken Empire's most prized forms of spectra.
summary.p4: In a thrilling, suspenseful story following the footsteps of classic action films like 'Man from Nowhere,' Josen and the Kid become interlocked in a battle of wits and strength spiraling into a shocking conclusion as they attempt to pull off the ultimate heist. The Spectra Heist will give the audience a look into the Gen Sol Galaxy, its vision of alluring beauty and also terrifying horror. The series will reveal secrets and lore to be established for possible future stories.

josen.name: Josen
josen.description: The main character Josen is a farmer and father of Naro, a young girl, on a small unimportant planet on the outskirts of the Gen Sol Galaxy. He lives a simple but honest life working hard on his plot of land and trying his best to raise his daughter. His greatest heartache has been losing the love of his life, Naro's mother, to an incurable illness. He has let this tragedy that has scarred his psychology deeply affect his relationship with Naro who he loves more than anything.

naro.name: Naro
naro.description: Naro, Josen's daughter, is a mature 9 year old girl who spends her days doing all the chores and farm work around their cottage. Even though she also works hard while her father is gone all day to work the land, she has fun spending time and talking with her faithful, good natured pet Lashi. Doing the farm work together, Naro often shares with Lashi her dream of flying into space and visiting other famous planets with her father. At first it's clear that she is a child who has been raised with love, but the loss of her mother has deeply wounded her and affected how she sees her father. Because of his constant worrying, she has started to hide things from him which will ultimately set off the series of events that will lead to her kidnapping.

creativeChallenge.title: Creative Challenge
creativeChallenge.p1: The biggest creative challenge besides worldbuilding the Gen Sol Galaxy to make it an exciting backdrop for the story was to create a complicated but honest relationship between father and daughter to have the audience sympathize with Josen's horror at losing his daughter and then his desperation to save her. To create these strong emotional ties to the characters it was necessary to portray how the trauma of losing the most important person in their lives, Naro's mother, has deeply affected their psychology creating dynamics that have damaged their relationship. The story becomes a parable of how projecting your trauma on to others can drive them away.

commercialization.title: Commercialization Plans
commercialization.p1: Gen Sol wants to establish and manage a popular sci-fi IP where exciting stories with great characters can be told. We want to collaborate or partner with the best creative minds in different industries who find inspiration in our sci-fi concept.
commercialization.p2: It all starts with this first animation series The Spectra Heist to introduce sci-fi fans to the potential world building in the Gen Sol Galaxy.
